economic_notes: Nation owns and operates Atikameg Construction and Oilfield Maintenance Corporation, Atikameg Timber Limited Partnership, Atikameg Timber Ltd., Kee Tas Kee Now Sawmill Limited Partnership (25%), Kee Tas Kee Now Sawmill Ltd. (33.3%), and Whitefish Lake First Nation Child and Family Services. Operates Atikameg Confectionary. Significant investment portfolio (~$80.7M) through CIBC Private Wealth Management in land claim and agricultural benefit trust funds.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Statement includes consolidation of five controlled entities including Child and Family Services and multiple business entities. Nation holds approximately $80.7M in trust fund investments (land claim and agricultural benefit funds) through CIBC Private Wealth Management. Unrealized investment loss of $4.4M recorded in year. Total expenditures per Schedule 4 ($35,064,812) differ from Statement of Financial Activities ($31,764,603) due to inclusion of amortization ($3,318,728) and rounding. ISC funding not separately identified; Kee Tas Kee Now Tribal Council ($17.9M) is the primary funding conduit. No schedule of remuneration provided. Line of credit of $80,000 outstanding at year end. CMHC rapid housing initiative deferred contribution of $1.14M noted.
